note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.block.zone module functions.

method_groups.prop: prop, prop_fluid, prop_thermal, set_prop, set_prop_fluid, set_prop_thermal
method_groups.strain: strain_inc, strain_rate, strain_rotation_inc, strain_rotation_rate, strain_shear_int, strain_shear_rate, strain_total, strain_vol_int, strain_vol_rate
method_groups.stress: set_stress, stress, stress_effective, stress_int, stress_max, stress_min, stress_prin_dir

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the zone extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: gp
methods.description: Get a zone gridpoint int (1, 2, 3 or 4), indicating the four surrounding gridpoints.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the zone group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: zone.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the zone. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this zone is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: hostblock
methods.description: Get the block to which a zone belongs.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the zone id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: zone.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the zone is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) for the zone.

methods.name: is_excavated
methods.description: Get the excavated state of the zone.

methods.name: is_hidden
methods.description: Get the hidden state of the zone.

methods.name: mass
methods.description: Get zone mass.

methods.name: model
methods.description: Get the zone material model as a string.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the zone location (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the zone location.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the zone location.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the zone location.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the zone pore pressure (average of gridpoint pore pressures).

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get a property.

methods.name: prop_fluid
methods.description: Get a fluid property of the zone.

methods.name: prop_thermal
methods.description: Get a thermal property of the zone.

methods.name: props
methods.description: Get a list of all properies.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the zone extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: zone.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the zone group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_model
methods.description: Set the zone material model as a string.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.description: Set the a property.

methods.name: set_prop_fluid
methods.description: Set a thermal property of the zone.

methods.name: set_prop_thermal
methods.description: Set a thermal property of the zone.

methods.name: set_state
methods.description: Set the plasticity state indicator (sum of integer values).

methods.name: set_stress
methods.description: Set the zone stress tensor.

methods.name: state
methods.description: Get the plasticity state indicator (sum of integer values).

methods.name: strain_inc
methods.description: Get the zone strain increment, based on the current displacement field.

methods.name: strain_rate
methods.description: Get the zone strain rate, based on the current velocity field.

methods.name: strain_rotation_inc
methods.description: Get the zone rotational increment tensor, based on the current displacement field.

methods.name: strain_rotation_rate
methods.description: Get the zone rotation rate tensor, based on the current velocity field.

methods.name: strain_shear_int
methods.description: Get the zone shear strain increment based on the current displacement field.

methods.name: strain_shear_rate
methods.description: Get the zone shear strain rate based on the current velocity field.

methods.name: strain_total
methods.description: Get the value of the von Mises strain for a zone.

methods.name: strain_vol_int
methods.description: Get the zone volumetric strain increment based on the current displacement field.

methods.name: strain_vol_rate
methods.description: Get the zone volumetric strain rate based on the current velocity field.

methods.name: stress
methods.description: Get the zone stress tensor.

methods.name: stress_effective
methods.description: Get the zone effective stress.

methods.name: stress_int
methods.description: Get the intermediate principal stress.

methods.name: stress_max
methods.description: Get the maximum (most positive) principal stress.

methods.name: stress_min
methods.description: Get the minimum (most negative) principal stress.

methods.name: stress_prin_dir
methods.description: Get the zone principal stress directions.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this zone is live.

methods.name: vol
methods.description: Get the zone volume.
